paracetamol.note: Avoid alcohol. Do not exceed 4g per day. Alcohol increases liver damage risk.

acetaminophen.note: Avoid alcohol. Do not exceed 4g per day.

iron.note: Take iron on an empty stomach with water or vitamin C juice for best absorption. Wait 2 hours after dairy.

warfarin.note: Maintain consistent Vitamin K intake rather than avoiding it entirely. Sudden changes can affect INR levels.

metformin.note: Take with meals to reduce GI side effects. A low-carb diet supports metformin efficacy.

avoid: High-oxalate foods like spinach when taken together
recommended: Vitamin D foods (fortified milk, fatty fish)
calcium.note: Take calcium carbonate with food. Calcium citrate can be taken anytime.

recommended: Take on empty stomach 30-60 min before breakfast
thyroid.note: Consistency is key. Take at the same time daily, ideally 30-60 minutes before breakfast.

recommended: Probiotic foods (yogurt, kefir) - 2+ hours after dose
antibiotic.note: Complete the full course. Probiotics help maintain gut health during antibiotic therapy.

avoid: High-vitamin E foods in large amounts
recommended: Take with food or milk to reduce stomach upset
aspirin.note: Take with food to reduce gastrointestinal irritation.

recommended: Heart-healthy diet rich in fruits and vegetables
statin.note: Grapefruit can significantly increase statin levels in blood. Avoid it completely.
